name: Earth's Layers Cross-Section Diagram
description: Create a 2-page educational flipchart about Earth's internal structure. Page 1 must contain a labeled and color-coded diagram showing a cross-section of the Crust, Mantle, Outer Core, and Inner Core. Page 2 must contain a table documenting the Layer Name, Thickness, and State of Matter for each of these four layers. Save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/earths_layers.flipchart.
